chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-970 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case 10-01-2024 Mr. Muhammad Tarique Maitlo, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Faiz Muhammad Shar, Advocate for respondents No.6&7. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for respondents submits that entire payment has been made to the petitioner and as soon as bill in respect of Leave Preparatory to Retirement (LPR) is deposited, the same will be sanctioned in accordance with law and payment would be paid to the petitioner. Learned counsel for petitioner is satisfied and petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
